---
title: |
  Anatomy of a modular toolchain for bioinformatics workflows
format:
  abstract-pdf:
    keep-tex: true
    linenumbers: false
    pagenumbers: false
    doublespacing: false
  html: default
runningtitle:
runningauthor: Sovacool
author:
  - name: Kelly Sovacool
    affiliations:
      - ref: fnl
    orcid: 0000-0003-3283-829X
    email: kelly.sovacool@nih.gov
  - name: Samarth Mathur
    affiliations:
      - ref: fnl
  - name: Vishal Koparde
    affiliations:
      - ref: fnl
    orcid: 0000-0001-8978-8495
  - name: Parthav Jailwala
    affiliations:
      - ref: fnl
affiliations:
    - id: fnl
      name: Advanced Biomedical Computational Science, Frederick National Laboratory for Cancer Research, Frederick, MD, 21702, USA
reference-section-title: References
bibliography: ../bibliography.bib
project_website: https://CCBR.github.io/reproducible-toolchain
source_code: https://github.com/CCBR/reproducible-toolchain
license_txt: https://github.com/CCBR/reproducible-toolchain/blob/main/LICENSE.md
---

# Abstract {#sec-intro}

Python-based CLI to run workflows [@roach_ten_2022]

::: {#fig-example fig-cap="Anatomy of a reusable, modular workflow toolchain"}
```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 6.5
{{< include ../img/diagram.mmd >}}
```
:::
